ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop entry */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the crop in square units */,
  "perimeter" REAL /* Perimeter of the crop in linear units */,
  "compactness" REAL /* Compactness ratio of the crop */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement of the crop */,
  "width" REAL /* Width measurement of the crop */,
  "asymmetry_coefficient" REAL /* Asymmetry coefficient of the crop */,
  "groove_length" REAL /* Length of grooves present on the crop */,
  "grain_variety" TEXT /* Variety of the grain (e.g., Kama wheat) */,
  "crop_batch" TEXT /* Batch identifier for the crop */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date when the crop was harvested */,
  "field_location" TEXT /* Location of the field where the crop was grown */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil used for cultivation */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation used */,
  "pesticide_used" TEXT /* Type of pesticide used */,
  "fertilizer_used" TEXT /* Type of fertilizer used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crops_grain_variety FOREIGN KEY ("grain_variety") REFERENCES grain_varieties ("variety_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "grain_varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grain variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the grain variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grain variety */,
  "genetic_modification" TEXT /* Indicates if the variety is genetically modified */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Resistance of the variety to specific diseases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farmers" (
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmer */,
  "farmer_name" TEXT /* Name of the farmer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the farmer */,
  "farm_location" TEXT /* Location of the farmer's farm */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of farming experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications the farmer has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cultivation_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cultivation method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the cultivation method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "efficiency" TEXT /* Efficiency of the method in terms of yield */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cultivation_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cultivation record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop being cultivated */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farmer managing the crop */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cultivation method used */,
  "cultivation_date" TEXT /* Date of cultivation */,
  "fertilizer_amount" TEXT /* Amount of fertilizer used */,
  "pesticide_amount" TEXT /* Amount of pesticide used */,
  "irrigation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of irrigation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cultivation_records_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cultivation_records_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES cultivation_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cultivation_records_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_quality_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality test */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was performed */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the quality test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of quality test conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "tested_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_quality_tests_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agronomist, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crop data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crop data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop related to this condition */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the growth period */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level during the growth period */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall recorded during the growth period */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when these conditions were recorded */,
  "sunlight_hours" REAL /* Number of sunlight hours */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)
